error_signature: Loop Over Items node accumulates items across batches
title: Loop Over Items accumulates items instead of resetting
symptom: The Loop Over Items node outputs all processed items instead of just the current batch, leading to incorrect results.
applies_when: Receiving multiple batches from an HTTP request
not_this_if: Only processing a single batch of items
Loop Over Items node is not finalized
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node is designed to accumulate items across different executions. When it finalizes, it outputs all items processed so far, which can cause confusion when handling multiple batches.
fix_steps: Move the loop logic into a subworkflow.
Use a Split In Batches node to iterate over the HTTP output and call the subworkflow for each batch.
agent_instruction: Implement a subworkflow for the loop logic to ensure it resets for each batch.
